mapper.select: SELECT DISTINCT t.tblname AS tableName, 'BASE TABLE' AS tableType FROM _base_tbllist t LEFT JOIN _base_dbinfo d ON d.Id = t.dbid AND d.lingma_sys_ent = t.lingma_sys_ent WHERE t.lingma_sys_ent = 'NewApp' AND t.tblname IS NOT NULL AND t.tblname != '' AND ( #{dbName} IS NULL OR #{dbName} = '' OR d.Name = #{dbName} OR d.NameStr = #{dbName} OR d.ValueName = #{dbName} OR #{dbName} = DATABASE() ) ORDER BY t.tblname

SELECT f.enname AS columnName, CASE WHEN MAX(CASE WHEN IFNULL(f.IsPKey, 0) != 0 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) = 1 THEN 'PRI' ELSE '' END AS columnKey FROM base_tblfield f LEFT JOIN _base_tbllist t ON t.lingma_sys_ent = f.lingma_sys_ent AND ( BINARY t.rowid = BINARY f.tblid OR BINARY t.tblname = BINARY f.tblname ) LEFT JOIN _base_dbinfo d ON d.Id = t.dbid AND d.lingma_sys_ent = t.lingma_sys_ent WHERE f.lingma_sys_ent = 'NewApp' AND f.tblname = #{tableName} AND f.enname IS NOT NULL AND f.enname != '' AND ( #{dbName} IS NULL OR #{dbName} = '' OR d.Name = #{dbName} OR d.NameStr = #{dbName} OR d.ValueName = #{dbName} OR #{dbName} = DATABASE() OR t.rowid IS NULL ) GROUP BY f.enname ORDER BY f.enname
